category_sources: source_facts.description says sshs is a graphical command-line client for SSH.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives sshs; source_facts.repo is the official quantumsheep/sshs repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official repository README, the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/quantumsheep/sshs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a graphical command-line SSH client; source_facts.executables lists sshs.
